headlines.title: eMarketer: chatbots like ChatGPT and Google AI Mode will generate less than $1B in ad revenue in 2026; OpenAI projected $2.5B in ChatGPT ad revenue this year (Trishla Ostwal/Adweek)
Sources: DeepSeek is in preliminary talks with investors about raising new funds at a ~$71B valuation, after raising ~$7B at a ~$52B valuation at the end of May (Zijing Wu/Financial Times)
Venture funding drops in Seattle area as AI boom reshapes startup world
A look at AI world models, including how they work, what they can do, and what's still unsettled, as startups led by tech leaders like Yann LeCun raise billions (Samuel Axon/Ars Technica)
OpenAI wants its legal fees from xAI, while Apple comes for OpenAI
This founder sold his startup to Klarna for €110m. Now he's raised €12m to build again
Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
Anthropic recruits Monzo cofounder Tom Blomfield for AI compute team
Google’s Demis Hassabis says it’s time for a global AI watchdog — led by the US
IBM reports preliminary Q2 revenue of $17.2B, below $17.9B est., as CEO Arvind Krishna says customers are holding back spending; IBM falls 17% pre-market (Amy Thomson/Bloomberg)
So Far, 2026 Is A Solid Year For Cybersecurity Startup Funding
Demis Hassabis proposes a US-based Standards Body for "Frontier-class" AI, modeled after the FINRA; labs would voluntarily share models 30 days before release (Demis Hassabis/@demishassabis)
Huawei Digital Power now rivals Tesla’s energy division in revenue
DeepSeek’s Liang Wenfeng overtakes Amodei and Brockman as AI’s richest founder
Exclusive: Peec rival Promptwatch raises €6m seed round
Apple sues OpenAI after ex-engineer allegedly used bug to steal trade secrets
ACRouter picks the smartest AI model per task, beating Opus-only setups by 2.6x on cost
Archives to avatars: Famed historian is moved by Microsoft’s AI-powered Theodore Roosevelt at new library
Welcome To The ‘Show Me’ Era: Sapphire Ventures’ Anders Ranum On What Separates Winning AI Startups From The Rest
Augmodo raises $21M to push its spatial AI beyond just retail toward the broader physical workforce
Helsing raises $1.8bn backed by Goldman and Lightspeed
Etzioni on AI: Who disagrees with you about AI? Here’s what the research shows
The European Commission approves €659M in German state aid to support four first-of-a-kind chip facilities in Germany, saying they will strengthen EU autonomy (Kirsti Knolle/Reuters)
The first sunlight reflecting space mirror has been cleared for launch
